c.d: The total number of movies and TV shows available on the platform.
The number of exclusive movies and TV series produced by the platform.
The monthly fee required to access the platform's content.
Availability of free content supported by advertisements.
The range of devices (e.g., smartphones, smart TVs, streaming devices) that support the app.
The ease of navigation and overall user experience of the app.
The maximum resolution and audio quality offered by the platform.
Availability of downloading content for offline viewing.
Regions or countries where the app is accessible.
Availability of live television channels or events.
